text.title: vui-iot-integration Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree from device count to grouping policy + feedback shape. Each leaf references a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: report per-device outcome on any failure
add ≥3 noise conditions including kitchen + tv

text.example: device_count=6 → grouping mandatory → undo enabled → partial-failure feedback on → 3 noise conditions → config valid.
